# A New Dawn — llms.txt

> A New Dawn is a soul remembrance movement and healing practice led by Misty Dawn Merrier (spirit name: Shakina Ray).

## About
A New Dawn is a portal to embodying your infinite intelligence. The practice blends bodywork, energy activation, spiritual clearing, and soul coaching to help people transmute stagnant energies and step into their creative genius, flow, peace, joy, prosperity, and authentic expression.

## Practitioner
- Name: Misty Dawn Merrier (Shakina Ray)
- Heritage: Nehiyaw (Woodland Cree) and European
- Credentials: Registered Massage Therapist, Neurofascial Specialist, Certified Emotion & Body Code Practitioner, Advanced PSYCH-K® Facilitator, Soul Coach, Energy Intuitive, Spiritual Liberator
- Location: Based in Canada and Hawaii, serving souls worldwide

## Offerings
- **Ceremonial Session (Body. Mind. Soul.)**: Personalized healing blending bodywork, energy activation, and spiritual clearing. Tobacco is offered for this experience.
- **Coaching & Energetic Alignment (Body. Mind. Soul.)**: Transmute stagnation in any area of life. Increase momentum, clarity, drive and awareness.
- **Earth Optimization**: Ensure harmony in buildings, homes, businesses, sites. Transmutation of stagnant and spiritual energies for desired outcomes.
- **Registered Massage Therapy**: Therapeutic bodywork grounded in deep knowledge of the physical body, fascia, and the nervous system.

## Values
This space is held with: Safety. Honesty. Alchemy. Love.
